narrative:
Precinct Logan 1 (precinct in Hocking County) has 1,136 registered voters, with 58.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.8%, a modest Republican lean of 3.7 percentage points.
